chatSummary.title: Chat Summary
chatSummary.description: ALWAYS pass this. A faithful, detailed summary/transcript of the conversation so the solved service Case stores what the shopper asked, what you checked, and what you answered.

email.title: Email
email.description: Optional. Use the shopper's email only when they are signed in or voluntarily provided it for shopping/profile use. Leave blank for an anonymous single-use coupon.

orderIdentifier.title: Order Identifier
orderIdentifier.description: Order number or WooCommerce order id. Leave blank to use their most recent order.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass the loggedInEmail variable. Required for the action to return order data; if empty the action returns a sign-in message.
